allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('visibility:', d.get\('visibility','N/A'\)\); print\('private:', d.get\('private','N/A'\)\); print\('name:', d.get\('name','N/A'\)\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/jg-shoealls/Shoealls" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "visibility: $\($r.visibility\)"; "private: $\($r.private\)"; "name: $\($r.name\)" } else { "접근 불가 \(private 또는 존재하지 않음\)" })
